properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Azaka is not unlocked with this skin. Azaka can only be unlocked by completing Azaka's Procession - Part 2 - the second Variant of the Tomb of the Nine Gods adventure in the Tomb of Annihilation Campaign.

backstory.original: Azaka Stormfang was once a guide who operated out of Port Nyanzaru on Chult. She originally concealed her curse of lycanthropy from the champions, as she has lost many friends to that revelation in the past. Her true self was revealed to the Champions after she valiantly helped them collect 3 of the 9 puzzle cubes they needed to defeat the villain Acererak in the Tomb of the Nine Gods. She was killed in the battle, but was able to be resurrected after the champions defeated Acererak's soulmonger. Now, she travels with her new friends, as a champion.
backstory.display: 阿扎卡·风暴之牙曾经在楚尔特的南扎路港担任导游。最初她对勇士们隐瞒了她的兽化诅咒，因为过去的很多朋友得知这件事后都离开了她。在她对勇士们提供了英勇无畏的帮助，收集到了在九神之墓中消灭恶人阿瑟瑞拉克所需 9 个谜题方块中的 3 个后，她的真实身份被勇士们所知晓。她在战斗中英勇牺牲，但在勇士们消灭了阿瑟瑞拉克的灵魂商贩后得以复活。现在她也成为了一名勇士，和她的新朋友们一起踏上旅程。

description.original: Azaka leaps into the air and strikes a random enemy; 33% cleave chance
description.display: 阿扎卡跳到空中，攻击一名随机敌人，并有 33% 几率使用顺势斩。

description.original: Azaka dons her Mask of the Beast, summoning 2 tigers to her side for 30 seconds, the tigers attack every 5 seconds
description.display: 阿扎卡戴上野兽面具，召唤 2 只老虎来陪伴她。持续 30 秒，老虎每 5 秒攻击一次。

longDescription.original: Azaka dons her Mask of the Beast, summoning 2 tigers to her side that attack every 5 seconds. The tigers stay for 30 seconds. If Azaka specs with Lycanthrope Forever the tiger attacks count towards her weretiger transformation, and her weretiger cooldown is paused during her Ultimate. If she specs with Resist the Curse, the tigers' attacks cause enemies to drop gold even if they aren't killed.
longDescription.display: 阿扎卡戴上野兽面具，召唤 2 只老虎来陪伴她。持续 30 秒，老虎每 5 秒攻击一次。如果阿扎卡选择永久兽化专精，老虎的攻击也会计入她的虎人形态转化所需的攻击次数，同时她虎人形态的冷却在杀招持续时间内会暂停。如果她专精抵抗诅咒，则在老虎的攻击未能击杀敌人时，敌人会掉落金币。

description.desc: Azaka is a weretiger. After $azaka_attacks attacks in human form, she changes into a weretiger for $azaka_time seconds, increasing her damage by $amount%$weretiger_description
阿扎卡是一名虎人。当$azaka_attacks在人类形态下攻击后，她会转化为虎人形态，持续 $azaka_time 秒，提升自身 $amount% 伤害$weretiger_description

tipText.original: Azaka transforms into a weretiger after several hits. Her damage increases while she's a weretiger.
tipText.display: 阿扎卡在命中数次后变身虎人。成为虎人期间，她的伤害会提高。

description.desc: Increases all Gold found by $(amount)%. This ability is reduced by 50% while Azaka is in weretiger form
提升所有金币获得量 $(amount)%。阿扎卡处于虎人形态时，此技能效果降低 50%

tipText.original: Azaka increases your gold found; this bonus is reduced when she's in weretiger form.
tipText.display: 阿扎卡使获得金币增加。成为虎人期间，此加成降低。

description.desc: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% if they are in an exterior location
在户外场景时，提升所有勇士 $amount% 伤害
While in weretiger form, Azaka does an additional $(not_buffed amount)% more damage per attack (stacking multiplicatively). Resets when she changes back to human form.
在虎人形态下，阿扎卡每次攻击时造成 $(not_buffed amount)% 额外伤害（以乘算方式堆叠），此效果在她变回人类形态时重置。
Reduces the amount of time Azaka spends in weretiger form by $amount%
减少 $amount% 阿扎卡处于虎人形态的时间

specializationDescription.original: Azaka resists her lycanthropic curse, reducing the amount of time spent in weretiger form.
specializationDescription.display: 阿扎卡抵抗她的兽化诅咒，减少虎人形态的持续时间。

description.desc: Reduces the number of attacks needed to trigger Azaka's weretiger transformation by $amount
减少 $amount 次触发阿扎卡的虎人形态所需的攻击次数

specializationDescription.original: Azaka embraces her lycanthropic curse, decrease the time it takes to enter weretiger form.
specializationDescription.display: 阿扎卡接纳她的兽化诅咒，缩短化身虎人形态所需的时间。

description.original: Didn't we meet in a tavern? Or was that someone else?
description.display: 我们是不是在酒馆见过？还是我记错了？

description.original: Be careful around grappler vines. They're better at it.
description.display: 在擒抱者藤蔓周围要小心，他们更擅长于此。

description.original: You need a leader? I'm but a guide.
description.display: 你需要一名首领？我只是个向导。

description.original: The jungles of Chult are no match for us!
description.display: 楚尔特的丛林不是我们的对手！

description.original: The riches of Omu are ours to discover.
description.display: 奥穆的财富等着我们去发掘。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Azaka Stormfang was once a guide who operated out of Port Nyanzaru on Chult. She originally concealed her curse of lycanthropy from the champions, as she has lost many friends to that revelation in the past. Her true self was revealed to the Champions after she valiantly helped them collect 3 of the 9 puzzle cubes they needed to defeat the villain Acererak in the Tomb of the Nine Gods. She was killed in the battle, but was able to be resurrected after the champions defeated Acererak's soulmonger. Now, she travels with her new friends, as a champion.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Azaka is a lycanthrope and switches between human and weretiger form periodically. Her damage increases the longer she's in weretiger form, and she provides a powerful gold find buff while in human form.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Azaka is not unlocked with this skin. Azaka can only be unlocked by completing Azaka's Procession - Part 2 - the second Variant of the Tomb of the Nine Gods adventure in the Tomb of Annihilation Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 阿扎卡·风暴之牙曾经在楚尔特的南扎路港担任导游。最初她对勇士们隐瞒了她的兽化诅咒，因为过去的很多朋友得知这件事后都离开了她。在她对勇士们提供了英勇无畏的帮助，收集到了在九神之墓中消灭恶人阿瑟瑞拉克所需 9 个谜题方块中的 3 个后，她的真实身份被勇士们所知晓。她在战斗中英勇牺牲，但在勇士们消灭了阿瑟瑞拉克的灵魂商贩后得以复活。现在她也成为了一名勇士，和她的新朋友们一起踏上旅程。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 阿扎卡能够兽化，定期在人类和虎人形态之间切换。她在虎人形态的时间越长，伤害就越高。在人类形态下，她能提供强大的金币寻获增益。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士阿扎卡不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“阿扎卡的行进 - 第 2 部分”——“湮灭之墓”战役中“九神之墓”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁阿扎卡。
